'''Bjork Umi''' was called a "Vermin Hunter" by [[Tsavong Lah]] who used him to try to assassinate [[Borsk Fey'lya]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]. He was killed by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] along with his associate when they tried to kill Fey'lya.

{{Char-stub}}
